findings.description: The CSS class name mappings (nablarch_info/warn/error) are presented as definitive, but the source qualifies them with "デフォルトでは" (by default), implying they are configurable defaults. Omitting this qualifier may lead an AI to assert these class names as fixed rather than as overridable defaults.
findings.source_evidence: デフォルトでは下記の対応でクラス名が出力される。

findings.location: automated warning: Section count 3 < source headings 5
findings.description: The automated pre-check warning is a false positive. The source file contains exactly 3 headed sections (one h1 and two h2), matching the 3 sections (s1, s2, s3) in the knowledge file. No additional headings exist in the source.
